# zstack_ceph_backup_storage (Resource)

Manages a ZStack Ceph Backup Storage resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mon_urls` (List of String) List of Ceph monitor URLs.
- `name` (String) The name of the Ceph backup storage.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Ceph backup storage.
- `pool_name` (String) The Ceph pool name for backup storage.

### Read-Only

- `available_capacity` (Number) Available capacity in bytes.
- `state` (String) The state of the backup storage.
- `status` (String) The status of the backup storage.
- `total_capacity` (Number) Total capacity in bytes.
- `type` (String) The type of the backup storage.
- `url` (String) The URL of the backup storage.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Ceph backup storage.
